libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No required environment variables or system properties were found. Tests should create an in-process ActorSystem, prefer localhost with an ephemeral port for server/client coverage, and always unbind/terminate the ActorSystem so JVM and native runs do not hang.

deterministic_setup.reason: The akka-http_2.13 and akka-http-core_2.13 POMs mark akka-stream_2.13 as provided, and the 10.5.3 documentation says users must choose an Akka version and add akka-stream manually.
The documented Java and Scala Akka HTTP server examples use typed ActorSystem/Behaviors from akka-actor-typed_2.13 with the matching Akka 2.7.0 version.

risks: Akka HTTP and Akka 2.7.0 are BUSL-licensed artifacts; dependency resolution from Maven Central should still work for these versions, but local Gradle verification remains authoritative.
Native Image may expose additional reachability gaps if tests exercise optional features such as custom serialization, HTTPS, or configured extensions.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Akka HTTP 10.5.3 does not bring the Akka runtime modules transitively for consumers; documented usage requires Akka 2.7.0 stream and actor modules before meaningful server/client coverage can compile and run.
